title: conveniently placed armor slots
description: Adds armor slots to any container for easy access.
body:
# conveniently placed armor slots

cpas adds armor slots to any container for easy access    
cpas has built-in Trinkets compatibility    
cpas should work with any vanilla or modded container    
cpas **also needs to be installed on the server to work**

## Configuration
When you open a container and want to change the position of cpas or disable it, press Ctrl+J and you will go to editor mode where you can change things.
